attrs.summary: This climate data record of sea ice concentration is obtained from medium resolution passive microwave satellite data over the polar regions (AMSR-E and AMSR2). The processing chain features: 1) dynamic tuning of tie-points and algorithms,  2) correction of atmospheric noise using a Radiative Transfer Model,  3) computation of per-pixel uncertainties, and 4) an optimal hybrid sea ice concentration algorithm. This product was generated in the context of the ESA Climate Change Initiative Programme (ESA CCI). The EUMETSAT OSI SAF contributed with access and re-use of part of its processing software and facilities.
attrs.title: Sea Ice Concentration Climate Data Record from ESA CCI

attrs.comment: this is one of the two components contributing to 'total_standard_error'
attrs.long_name: algorithm uncertainty (one standard deviation) of concentration of sea ice

attrs.comment: this field is the primary sea ice concentration estimate for this climate data record
attrs.long_name: fully filtered concentration of sea ice using atmospheric correction of brightness temperatures and open water filters

attrs.comment: this field can be used in combination with 'ice_conc' to access un-bounded normal distribution of sea ice concentration estimates corresponding to the uncertainty estimate in 'total_standard_error'. It does also feature some amount of un-physical data (below 0% and above 100%).
attrs.long_name: sea ice concentration estimates as retrieved by the algorithm, and that were edited away by the various filters

attrs.comment: this is one of the two components contributing to 'total_standard_error'
attrs.long_name: smearing uncertainty (one standard deviation) of concentration of sea ice

attrs.comment: Flag values found in the map might be combinations of those listed above. For example flag value 80 (= 2^4 + 2^6 = 16 + 64) indicates high_t2m AND temporal_interp
attrs.flag_descriptions:
all bits to 0 (flag 0): Nominal retrieval by the SIC algorithm
bit 1 (flag 1): Position is over land
bit 2 (flag 2): Position is lake
bit 3 (flag 4): SIC is set to zero by the open water filter
bit 4 (flag 8): SIC value is changed for correcting land spill-over effects
bit 5 (flag 16): Handle with caution, the 2m air temperature is high at this position, and this might be false ice
bit 6 (flag 32): Value is the result of spatial interpolation
bit 7 (flag 64): Value is the result of temporal interpolation
bit 8 (flag 128): SIC is set to zero since position is outside maximum sea ice climatology.
attrs.flag_meanings: land lake open_water_filtered land_spill_over high_t2m spatial_interp temporal_interp max_ice_climo
attrs.long_name: status flag bit array for sea ice concentration retrievals
total uncertainty (one standard deviation) of concentration of sea ice
